statement: A horizontal beam AB has a length of 4 m and is simply supported at A (pin) and B (roller). A single point load of 500 N acts downward at the midpoint C (2 m from A). The beam is weightless. Find the reaction forces at A and B.
common_student_errors: Forgetting the horizontal reaction component at the pin support A
Taking moments about the wrong point, resulting in two unknowns in the moment equation
Sign error: treating the downward load as positive when the convention is positive-upward
